info.title: Book My Parcel API
info.description: Complete API documentation for Book My Parcel - A logistics platform connecting parcel senders with travelers

bearerAuth.description: Enter JWT token obtained from login

get.description: Retrieve user profile information
Retrieve specific order details by booking ID
Retrieve all orders/parcels for the authenticated user

post.description: Save device FCM token for push notifications

get.description: Retrieve user's referral stats and earnings

post.description: Submit KYC verification documents for traveller

get.description: Retrieve KYC status for current traveller
Retrieve all KYC submissions (Admin only)

patch.description: Approve or reject KYC submission (Admin only)

get.description: Retrieve dashboard statistics for traveller
Retrieve all assigned deliveries for traveller
Get parcel requests matching traveller's routes
Get payments pending for traveller
Get detailed booking information

patch.description: Update the status of a booking

post.description: Generate OTP for pickup or delivery
Verify OTP for pickup or delivery completion

get.description: Get current location and tracking status of a parcel

404.description: Booking not found or not accessible

get.description: Get tracking info via public shareable link

post.description: Start tracking for a booking (traveller only)

patch.description: Update traveller's current location during delivery
Mark tracking as complete when delivery is finished

post.description: Upload photo proof of pickup or delivery

get.description: Get autocomplete suggestions for addresses using Google Places API
Convert address string or place ID to latitude/longitude coordinates
Get the Google Maps JavaScript API key for frontend map rendering

post.description: Calculate route between two points using Google Routes API

get.description: Get current wallet balance for authenticated user
Get detailed wallet information
Get transaction history for wallet
Check KYC and bank verification status

post.description: Create a withdrawal request from wallet

get.description: Get all withdrawal requests history
Get details of a specific withdrawal

post.description: Process a pending withdrawal request (Admin only)
Create a Razorpay payment order for parcel booking

parcel_id.description: ID of the parcel to be paid for

post.description: Verify Razorpay payment signature and complete booking

razorpay_order_id.description: Razorpay order ID from create-order response

400.description: Invalid signature or payment verification failed

post.description: Create a new parcel delivery request with pickup and delivery details

patch.description: Update the current step of parcel creation form

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific parcel

post.description: Cancel a parcel request (user initiated)

400.description: Cannot cancel parcel in current status

post.description: Trigger matching algorithm to find travellers for this parcel

get.description: Get all traveller acceptances for this parcel
Get route geometry for acceptances visualization

post.description: Select a specific traveller for this parcel delivery
Express interest in a parcel delivery request
Accept a parcel delivery request
Reject a parcel delivery request

get.description: Get all parcel requests matching traveller's routes

post.description: Verify PAN card details
Verify bank account details
Add bank recipient for payouts

get.description: Retrieve KYC document (authenticated access only)

post.description: Submit rating and review for a booking

get.description: Check if feedback exists for a booking

put.description: Update existing feedback for a booking

get.description: Get all reviews for a specific traveller (public)

post.description: Raise a dispute against another user

get.description: Get all disputes raised by me
Get all disputes raised against me
Get disputes raised by users against me

post.description: Initiate the pickup process by generating and sending OTP to sender

400.description: Invalid booking status or booking not found

post.description: Verify pickup OTP provided by sender to confirm parcel pickup

200.description: Pickup verified successfully, parcel is now in transit

400.description: Invalid OTP or booking not in correct state

post.description: Initiate the delivery process by generating and sending OTP to recipient

400.description: Booking not in transit or not found

post.description: Verify delivery OTP provided by recipient to complete parcel delivery

400.description: Invalid OTP or delivery cannot be completed

post.description: Cancel a booking (traveller initiated cancellation)

reason.example: Unable to complete delivery due to vehicle breakdown

400.description: Booking cannot be cancelled in current status

post.description: Mark that payment has been received from recipient for PAD orders

get.description: Retrieve chat messages for a booking

post.description: Log a failed delivery attempt when recipient is unavailable

notes.description: Additional details about the failed attempt

rescheduled_at.description: When the next delivery attempt is scheduled

get.description: Get all delivery attempts for a booking

post.description: Create a new user account with INDIVIDUAL and TRAVELLER roles
Authenticate user and get JWT token
Login or signup using Firebase token
Request OTP for password reset (Step 1) or reset password with OTP (Step 2)

get.description: Retrieve authenticated user's profile

post.description: Upload or update user profile photo
Invalidate JWT token (blacklist)

Fetch all bookings with pagination
